scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --workspace backend && npm run coverage --workspace frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run serve:test --workspace backend" http://127.0.0.1:4173/health "playwright test"
scripts.qa:a11y: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run serve:test --workspace backend" http://127.0.0.1:4173/health "playwright test tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.ts"
scripts.qa:perf: npm run build && start-server-and-test "npm run serve:test --workspace backend" http://127.0.0.1:4173/health "node scripts/run-lighthouse.mjs"
